name: PT Intraco Penta Tbk
summary: PT Intraco Penta Tbk operates as a heavy equipment trading company in Indonesia. The company also provides mining contracting solutions, which include application and maintenance of mining equipment; and financing services for heavy equipment and other capital goods. It offers transportation and construction equipment; and provides fabrication and infrastructure support services for various sectors, including the mining, industrial, oil and gas, marine, and logistics, as well as operates a steam power plant. PT Intraco Penta Tbk was founded in 1970 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia.
